case_title: JOHN O. KOELSCH et al VS. TERRY JUSTIN HALL INDIVIDUALLY & et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO CARL EINAR ISACKSON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-19-2010 AT 3:30PM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY CO-DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,350.00 FILED BY KOELSCH, JOHN O. KOELSCH, LESLIE A. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, TERRY JUSTIN INDIVIDUALLY & DBA HALL CONSTRUCTION AND WOODWORKING
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL-GRANTED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00)<FAX FILING> SERVED SEP-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ISACKSON, CARL EINAR INDIVIDUALLY & DBA AXEL ISACKSON FLOOR COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOELSCH, JOHN O. KOELSCH, LESLIE A.
